description: FocalPoint-null Admin TO-DO List — for human oversight only. Completely separated from code project.

categories.human_oversight_required: Items requiring human admin review or approval

items.title: Initial system activation review
items.description: FocalPoint-null-00 has been bootstrapped for the first time. Admin should review: 1) PKI certificates generated for all agents in pki/, 2) .env configuration is correct, 3) ALLOW_AUTONOMOUS_ORGANIC_GROWTH flag is set intentionally, 4) Model credentials are configured correctly.
items.notes: Review config/.env.example and set .env before first run.

items.title: Define inter-agent communication protocol version
items.description: Establish a versioned protocol specification for all inter-agent messages brokered by FocalPoint-null-00. Current implementation uses JSON + RSA-2048 PKI signatures. Recommend formalising as a versioned schema in config/standards/.

items.title: Evaluate need for ReplayLog-Agent
items.description: Consider creating a dedicated ReplayLog-Agent to manage replay log generation, validation, and integration with FocalPoint-null checkpoint resume. Currently handled inline in checkpoint_manager.py. A dedicated agent would improve separation of concerns.

items.title: Rotate PKI master secret in production
items.description: The PKI_MASTER_SECRET in .env.example is a placeholder. Before any production use, this must be replaced with a cryptographically strong secret (32+ chars) preferably managed by an HSM or Azure Key Vault.
items.notes: See: NIST SP 800-57 for key management guidance.
